---
title: "Dorsum_environment"
author: "Ore, MJ."
date: "2025-03-11"
output: rmarkdown::github_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r prep data, echo = FALSE}

library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(viridis)

here::i_am("R_scripts/Color_correlations.Rmd")


avg_img <- read.csv(here("data/BTBW_whole_specimen_Image_Analysis_measurements_allpop_avgimg_wide.csv"))

## select only brightness for ASY males
asy <- avg_img %>% 
  filter(Age == "ASY") 


# combine w environment data  
env <- read.table(here("data/Env_by_individual_specimen_samples.txt"), header = T) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-Year)

lum_env <- merge(asy, env) 

#set year as a factor 


```

## Does location predict color ? 

```{r spatio-temporal fit, echo = F}

library(mgcv)
library(lmerTest)
library(MuMIn)

#perform linear regression
z <- lm(PC1_d~lat, data = asy, na.action = na.exclude)
sum_z <- summary(z)

# Extract the r^2 and p-value
r2adj <- sum_z$adj.r.squared
p_value <- sum_z$coefficients[2, "Pr(>|t|)"]

# Format the text to include rho and p-value, ready to be used in annotations
text_annotation <- bquote("Adjusted R"^2 ~ ": " ~ .(sprintf("%.2f", r2adj)) ~ ", p-value: " ~ .(sprintf("%.3f", p_value)))


ggplot(data = asy, aes(x = lat, y = PC1_d)) + 
  geom_point(width = 0.6, position = position_dodge(width = 0.7)) +
  labs(x = "Latitude", y = "Luminance (brightness)") +
  geom_smooth(aes(x = lat, y = PC1_d), method = "lm", col = "black")+
  theme_classic() +
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, label = text_annotation, 
           hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.1, size = 5, color = "blue")+
  theme(
    aspect.ratio = 0.75,
    text = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 14)
  )

lum_noNA <- lum_env %>% 
  filter(!is.na(PC1_d))

## spatio-temporal fit
mod2dp <- gamm(PC1_d ~ s(lon, lat), random = list(Region = ~1), 
                data = lum_noNA)
mod2d_randpopY <- gamm( PC1_d ~ s(lon, lat, by = Year), random = list(Region = ~1), 
                        data = lum_noNA )
mod2dY <- gam( PC1_d ~ s(lon, lat, by = Year), 
                data = lum_noNA )
mod2dY_nopop <- gam( PC1_d ~ s(lon, lat) + Year, method = "REML",
                   data = lum_noNA) 
modnull <- lmerTest::lmer(PC1_d ~ 1 + (1|Region),
                    data = lum_noNA, REML = T) 
modlatY <- lmerTest::lmer(PC1_d ~ lat + (1|Year) + (1|prepartor),
                    data = lum_noNA, REML = T) 
modlatY_nopop <- lmerTest::lmer(PC1_d ~ lat + Year + (1|prepartor),
                    data = lum_noNA, REML = T) 
modY <- lmerTest::lmer(PC1_d ~ Year + (1|Region),
                    data = lum_noNA, REML = T) 


aicsc <- AICc(mod2dp$lme ,mod2d_randpopY$lme, mod2dY, mod2dY_nopop, 
              modnull, modlatY, modlatY_nopop, modY)
aicsc$deltaic <- aicsc$AIC - min(aicsc$AIC)
aicsc$weights <- Weights(AICc(mod2dp$lme ,mod2d_randpopY$lme, mod2dY, mod2dY_nopop, 
              modnull, modlatY, modlatY_nopop, modY))

mod_names <- c("mod2dp" ,"mod2d_randpopY", "mod2dY", "mod2dY_nopop", 
              "modnull", "modlatY", "modlatY_nopop", "modY")
# Extract formulas as a character vector
aicsc$formulas <- lapply(mod_names, function(model_name) {
  model <- get(model_name)  # Retrieve the model object by name
  paste(deparse(formula(model)), collapse = " ")  # Convert the formula to a single string
}) 

aicsc_r <- aicsc %>%
  mutate(
    MarginalR2 = sapply(mod_names, function(model_name) {
      model <- get(model_name)  # Retrieve the model object by name
      if (inherits(model, "lmerMod")) {
        r.squaredGLMM(model)[1]  # Extract marginal R²
      } else {
        NA  # Return NA for non-lmer models
      }
    }),
    ConditionalR2 = sapply(mod_names, function(model_name) {
       model <- get(model_name)  # Retrieve the model object by name
      if (inherits(model, "lmerMod")) {
        r.squaredGLMM(model)[2]  # Extract conditional R²
      } else {
        NA  # Return NA for non-lmer models
      }
    })
  )

aicsc_r$formulas <- as.character(aicsc_r$formulas)
aicsc_r$df <- round(aicsc_r$df, digits = 2)
aicsc_r$AICc <- round(aicsc_r$AICc, digits = 2)
aicsc_r$deltaic <- round(aicsc_r$deltaic, digits = 2)
aicsc_r$weights <- signif(aicsc_r$weights, digits = 2)
aicsc_r$MarginalR2 <- signif(aicsc_r$MarginalR2, digits = 2)
aicsc_r$ConditionalR2 <- signif(aicsc_r$ConditionalR2, digits = 2)


model_results <- aicsc_r %>% 
  arrange(deltaic)

model_results

write.csv(model_results, here("results/spatiotemp_model_selection_table.csv"))

```

# Build model for env-dorsum correlation

```{r lmm pheno-env, echo = F}

library(lmerTest)
library(MASS)
library(MuMIn)
library(performance)
library(sjPlot)

lum_sel <- lum_env %>% 
  dplyr::select(PC1_d, PPT_br, RH_br, Tave_br, srtm, ndvi_M, Year, lat, prepartor) %>% 
  na.omit()

options(na.action = "na.fail")

z <- lmerTest::lmer(PC1_d ~ PPT_br + RH_br + Tave_br*lat + srtm + 
                      ndvi_M + (1|Year) + (1|prepartor),
                    data = lum_sel, REML = T) 



check_model(z)
summary(z)
tab_model(z)

# Model selection: ranking by AICc using ML
ms2 <- dredge(z, trace = TRUE, rank = "AICc", REML = F)

print(ms2)                                  # Model selection table
bestmods <- ms2[ms2$delta < 5]                    # Tabulate only models with AIC difference < 5
Weights(ms2)                                # AIC weights all models
Weights(ms2[ms2$delta < 5])                   # Include only models with AIC difference < 5
get.models(ms2, subset=delta<5)  # Extract the models having AIC difference < 5
get.models(ms2, subset = 1)[[1]]            # Extract single best model (yields lm object)

lmter <- lm(get.models(ms2, subset = 1)[[1]], data = norand) # Fit best model
summary(model.avg(t, subset = delta < 2))              # model averaging


```

```{r random forest pheno-env, echo = F}

library(randomForest)

norand <- lum_env %>% 
  dplyr::select(PC1_d, PPT_br, RH_br, Tave_br, srtm, ndvi_M) %>% 
  na.omit()

model <- PC1_d ~ PPT_br + RH_br + Tave_br + srtm  + ndvi_M

rf1 <- randomForest(model, data = norand,
              ntreeTry=500,
               mtryStart=4, 
               stepFactor=1.5,
               improve=0.01,
               trace=FALSE #don't show real-time progress
               )
which.min(rf1$mse)
sqrt(rf1$mse[which.min(rf1$mse)])
plot(rf1)
randomForest::importance(rf1)
varImpPlot(rf1)


```

## Generalized Additive Model

```{r GAM, echo = F}

library(mgcv)
library(itsadug)

lum_sel <-  lum_env %>% 
  dplyr::select(PC1_d, PPT_br, RH_br, Tave_br, srtm, ndvi_M, 
                lat, lon, Year, prepartor, Region) %>% 
  na.omit()

# test for linear relationship

env <- c("PPT_br", "RH_br", "Tave_br", "srtm", 
         "ndvi_M", "lat", "lon")

for (i in 1:length(env)) {
  envvar <- env[i]
  linear_model <- gam(PC1_d ~ lum_sel %>% pull(envvar), data = lum_sel)
  smooth_model <- gam(PC1_d ~ s(lum_sel %>% pull(envvar)), data = lum_sel)
  aicsc <- AICc(linear_model, smooth_model)
  aicsc$env <- rep(envvar, nrow(aicsc))
  aicsc$delaic <- aicsc$AIC - min(aicsc$AIC)
  print(aicsc)
}
## all perform equally well as linear or smoothed... 

linear_model_s1 <- gam(PC1_d ~ Tave_br, data = lum_sel)
smooth_model_s1 <- gam(PC1_d ~ s(Tave_br), data = lum_sel)
#testing fit
ggplot(lum_sel, aes(x = Tave_br, y = PC1_d)) + geom_point() +
    geom_line(colour = "red", size = 1.2, aes(y = fitted(linear_model_s1))) +
    geom_line(colour = "blue", size = 1.2, aes(y = fitted(smooth_model_s1))) +
    theme_bw()

linear_model_s1 <- gam(PC1_d ~ srtm, data = lum_sel)
smooth_model_s1 <- gam(PC1_d ~ s(srtm), data = lum_sel)
#testing fit
ggplot(lum_sel, aes(x = srtm, y = PC1_d)) + geom_point() +
    geom_line(colour = "red", size = 1.2, aes(y = fitted(linear_model_s1))) +
    geom_line(colour = "blue", size = 1.2, aes(y = fitted(smooth_model_s1))) +
    theme_bw()


# running each variable separately and then choosing which to add to model based on AIC
full <- gamm(PC1_d ~ s(lon, lat) +s(RH_br) + s(Tave_br) + ti(Tave_br, lat) +
               Year + PPT_br + srtm + ndvi_M, 
          random = list(Region = ~1), data = lum_sel, method = "REML")
latlon <-gam( PC1_d ~ s(lon, lat, k = 20) + Year, 
                data = lum_sel, method = "REML" )
modnull <- lmerTest::lmer(PC1_d ~ 1 + (1|Region),
                    data = lum_noNA, REML = T) 
tave <- gam(PC1_d ~ s(lon, lat) + Year + s(Tave_br) + ti(Tave_br, lat),
            data = lum_sel, method = "REML")
ppt <- gam(PC1_d ~ s(lon, lat) + Year + PPT_br,  
           data = lum_sel, method = "REML")
rh <- gam(PC1_d ~ s(lon, lat) + Year + s(RH_br),  
          data = lum_sel, method = "REML")
srtm <- gam(PC1_d ~ s(lon, lat) + Year + srtm,  
          data = lum_sel, method = "REML")
ndvi <- gam(PC1_d ~ s(lon, lat) + Year + ndvi_M,  
          data = lum_sel, method = "REML")

aicsc <- AIC(full, modnull, latlon, tave, ppt, rh, srtm, ndvi)
aicsc$delaic <- aicsc$AIC - min(aicsc$AIC)
aicsc


trpe <- gam(PC1_d ~ s(lon, lat) + Year + s(Tave_br) + ti(Tave_br, lat) + srtm + s(RH_br) + PPT_br,
          data = lum_sel, method = "REML")
tnoXrpe <- gam(PC1_d ~ s(lon, lat) + Year + s(Tave_br) + srtm + s(RH_br) + PPT_br,
          data = lum_sel, method = "REML")
tnoXe <- gam(PC1_d ~ s(lon, lat) + Year + s(Tave_br) + srtm ,
          data = lum_sel, method = "REML")
tre <- gam(PC1_d ~ s(lon, lat) + Year + s(Tave_br) + ti(Tave_br, lat) + srtm + s(RH_br),
          data = lum_sel, method = "REML")
te <- gam(PC1_d ~ s(lon, lat) + Year + s(Tave_br) + ti(Tave_br, lat) + srtm,
          data = lum_sel, method = "REML")
tXr <- gam(PC1_d ~ s(lon, lat) + Year +s(Tave_br) + s(RH_br) +ti(Tave_br, RH_br),
          data = lum_sel, method = "REML")
lmter <- lmerTest::lmer(PC1_d ~ lat + RH_br + srtm + Tave_br + (1 | Year) + (1 | prepartor),
                    data = lum_sel, REML = T) 

#check model
gam.check(te) 
coef(te)
summary(te)


vis.gam(x = tave$gam, view = c("lat", "Tave_br"), plot.type = "persp", se =2, type = "response")

#run model selection and make table
aicsc <- AICc(latlon, full, trpe, tnoXrpe, tnoXe, tre, te, tXr, lmter)
aicsc$deltaic <- aicsc$AIC - min(aicsc$AIC)
aicsc$weights <- Weights(AICc(latlon, full, trpe, tnoXrpe, tnoXe, tre, te, tXr, lmter))

# Extract formulas as a character vector
aicsc$formulas <- sapply(rownames(aicsc), function(model_name) {
  model <- get(model_name)  # Retrieve the model object by name
  paste(deparse(formula(model)), collapse = " ")  # Convert the formula to a single string
})

aicsc$MarginalR2 <- rep(NA,nrow(aicsc))
aicsc$ConditionalR2 <- rep(NA,nrow(aicsc))

aicsc$MarginalR2[which(rownames(aicsc) == "lmter")] <-  round(r.squaredGLMM(lmter)[1], digits = 2)
aicsc$ConditionalR2[which(rownames(aicsc) == "lmter")] <-  round(r.squaredGLMM(lmter)[2], digits = 2)

aicsc$df <- round(aicsc$df, digits = 2)
aicsc$AICc <- round(aicsc$AICc, digits = 2)
aicsc$deltaic <- round(aicsc$deltaic, digits = 2)
aicsc$weights <- signif(aicsc$weights, digits = 2)

model_results <- aicsc %>% 
  arrange(deltaic)

model_results

write.csv(model_results, here("results/env_model_selection_table.csv"))
```



```{r plot}


ggplot(data = lum_env, aes(x = bio_10, y = PC1_d, color = lat))+
  geom_point(size =4)+
  labs(x = "Mean Temperature of Warmest Quarter", y = "PC1 Dorsum")+
  geom_line(aes(y = fitted(te)), colour = "red", size = 1.2)+
  theme_classic()

z <- lm(PC1_d~ bio_10, data = lum_env)
summary(z)

  
ggplot(data = lum_env, aes(x = lat, y = bio_10, color = PC1_d))+
  geom_point(size=4, position = "jitter")+
  labs(x = "Latitude", y = "Mean Temperature of Warmest Quarter")+
  theme_classic()

ggplot(data = lum_env, aes(x = PC1_d, y = lat, color = bio_10))+
  geom_point(size=4, position = "jitter")+
  labs(x = "Dorsum PC1", y = "Latitude")+
  theme_classic()

ggplot(data = lum_env, aes(x = ndvi_M, y = PC1_d, color = lat))+
  geom_point(size =4)+
  labs(x = "Max NDVI", y = "Dorsum brightness")+
  geom_smooth(aes(x = ndvi_M, y = PC1_d), method = "lm", col = "black")+  
  theme_classic()

z <- lm(PC1_d~ ndvi_M, data = lum_env)
summary(z)

ggplot(data = lum_env, aes(x = bio_18, y = PC1_d, color = lat))+
  geom_point(size =4)+
  labs(x = "Precip of Warmest Quarter", y = "Dorsum brightness")+
  geom_smooth(aes(x = bio_18, y = PC1_d), method = "lm", col = "black")+  
  theme_classic()

z <- lm(PC1_d~ bio_18, data = lum_env)
summary(z)

ggplot(data = lum_env, aes(x = qscat, y = PC1_d, color = lat))+
  geom_point(size =4)+
  labs(x = "Surface Moisture", y = "Dorsum brightness")+
  geom_smooth(aes(x = qscat, y = PC1_d), method = "lm", col = "black")+  
  theme_classic()

z <- lm(PC1_d~ qscat, data = lum_env, na.action = "na.omit")
summary(z)

ggplot(data = lum_env, aes(x = srtm, y = PC1_d, color = lat))+
  geom_point(size =4)+
  labs(x = "Elevation", y = "Dorsum brightness")+
  geom_smooth(aes(x = srtm, y = PC1_d), method = "lm", col = "black")+  
  theme_classic()

z <- lm(PC1_d~ srtm, data = lum_env)
summary(z)


ggplot(data = lum_env, aes(x = Tave08_molt, y = PC1_d, color = lat))+
  geom_point(size = 4)+
  labs(x = "Mean Temperature in August during molt", y = "PC1 Dorsum")+
  geom_smooth(aes(x = Tave08_molt, y = PC1_d), method = "lm", col = "black")+  
  theme_classic()

molt <- lm(PC1_d~ Tave08_molt, data = lum_env)
summary(molt)

ggplot(data = lum_env, aes(x = Tave_br, y = PC1_d, color = lat))+
  geom_point(size = 4)+
  labs(x = "Mean Temperature during breeding", y = "PC1 Dorsum")+
  geom_smooth(aes(x = Tave_br, y = PC1_d), method = "lm", col = "black")+  
  theme_classic()

br <- lm(PC1_d~ Tave_br, data = lum_env)
summary(br)

ggplot(data = lum_env, aes(x = Rad_br, y = PC1_d, color = lat))+
  geom_point(size =4)+
  labs(x = "Solar Radiation", y = "PC1 Dorsum")+
  theme_classic()
```

# morphometric data
```{r pca morpho}

morpho <- lum_env %>% 
  dplyr::select(ID, weight.g, wing.R.mm, tail.mm, bill.depth.mm, 
                bill.culmen.mm, bill.nares.mm, bill.width.mm, Tarsometatarsus) 
morphoIDs <- morpho$ID
morpho <- morpho[,-1]
morphopca <- prcomp( ~ ., data = morpho, , na.action = na.exclude, scale.=T)

biplot(morphopca, cex = 0.5, las = 1) 

pcscores <- data.frame(ID = morphoIDs, 
                       PC1 = morphopca$x[,1], PC2 = morphopca$x[,2], 
                  PC3 = morphopca$x[,3], PC4 = morphopca$x[,4])

lum_pc <- merge(lum_env, pcscores, all = T)

ggplot(data = lum_pc, aes(x = lat, y = PC2))+
  geom_point()+
  theme_classic()

ggplot(data = lum_pc, aes(x = bio_10, y = PC1, color = lat))+
  geom_point()+
  theme_classic()

ggplot(data = lum_pc, aes(x = srtm, y = PC2, color = lat))+
  geom_point()+
  theme_classic()

ggplot(data = lum_env, aes(x = wing.spot.L.mm, y = area_mm2_w ))+
  geom_point()+
  theme_classic()

cor.test(x=lum_env$wing.spot.L.mm, y=lum_env$area_mm2_w, method = "pearson")

```
